display_name_sources: source_facts.name is wzprof; current_curation.display-name is wzprof.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo identify the official GitHub project; its README is the primary official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/dispatchrun/wzprof, so repository redetermination was skipped as instructed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies profiling for Wazero; Wazero is a WebAssembly runtime.
